description: Sprint 2026-04-06 (HOTFIX): Resolve battery voltage 15.0V config boundary ambiguity (Variance 6 from Spool's 2026-04-12 code audit). Single-story sprint.

userStories.title: Resolve Battery Voltage 15.0V Config Boundary Ambiguity
userStories.description: Spool's code audit Variance 6 flagged that src/obd_config.json has cautionHighMax: 15.0 AND dangerHighMin: 15.0 — both referencing the same value, which looks ambiguous even though the runtime comparison logic (using strict > for dangerHighMin) is deterministic. The cautionHighMax field is not actually used in evaluateBatteryVoltage() comparisons (only normalMax and dangerHighMin drive the logic). This hotfix makes the config self-consistent and documents the field usage. Same pattern applies to cautionLowMin (descriptive-only, not used in comparison).
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/obd_config.json tieredThresholds.batteryVoltage.cautionHighMax from 15.0 to 14.99 (so it no longer visually collides with dangerHighMin: 15.0)

Update src/obd_config.json tieredThresholds.batteryVoltage.cautionLowMin from 12.5 to 12.01 if needed for same visual consistency (verify against docstring first — the field should represent the descriptive lower boundary of caution-low range)

Update docstring in src/alert/tiered_thresholds.py BatteryVoltageThresholds dataclass: clarify that cautionHighMax and cautionLowMin are DESCRIPTIVE ONLY and are NOT used in the evaluateBatteryVoltage comparison logic. Only normalMin, normalMax, dangerLowMax, and dangerHighMin affect runtime behavior.
Verify evaluateBatteryVoltage() comparison logic is unchanged (no behavior change expected)
Verify test_battery_voltage_thresholds.py tests all still pass with new config values
At exactly 15.0V input: result should still be CAUTION HIGH (not danger)
At exactly 15.01V input: result should be DANGER HIGH
At exactly 12.0V input: result should still be DANGER LOW (inclusive per <= comparison)
At exactly 12.01V input: result should be CAUTION LOW
Config JSON validates (python -m json.tool src/obd_config.json && python validate_config.py)
Update offices/pm/backlog.json to mark US-145 complete and adjust stats
userStories.notes: Reference: offices/pm/inbox/2026-04-12-from-spool-code-audit-variances.md Variance 6. Spool described this as 'Not blocking any sprint. Nice to fix when Ralph touches this file next.' CIO directed this hotfix 2026-04-12. Cosmetic config hygiene — no runtime behavior change expected.
